scripts.test:integration: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.lint: biome check packages/ vitest.setup.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write --unsafe packages/ vitest.setup.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.security: npm run security:sast && npm run security:secrets && npm run security:deps
